risk_findings.title: Inbound transitive external trust creates unbounded authentication path
risk_findings.detail: 'oxsium.local' trusts us (INBOUND), and the trust is transitive. Remote users from any domain that trusts 'oxsium.local' can potentially authenticate into our domain via Kerberos chaining. Restrict with selective authentication (trustAttributes |= 0x10) or convert to non-transitive.

risk_findings.title: Shortcut (intra-forest) trust detected — review intent
risk_findings.detail: Trust with 'oxsium.local' is an intra-forest shortcut trust (WITHIN_FOREST). These are normal in large forests for authentication performance, but bypass SID filtering entirely. Confirm this trust is intentional and the partner domain is expected to be within the same forest.
